auth.fix_localhost_desc: Because the app is running in the cloud, Supabase OAuth redirects to localhost by default until you add your development domain to Supabase.
auth.how_to_fix_supabase: How to fix this in Supabase:
auth.google_console_note: Google Console step: Make sure you've also added your Supabase callback URL to the Google Developer Console OAuth credentials list.

onboarding.title: Build your career engine.
onboarding.subtitle: Define your trajectory, commit to daily study blocks, and track your transition milestones with rule-based absolute clarity.
onboarding.goals_title: What certifications or career pathways are you targeting?
onboarding.goals_subtitle: Select from our recommended libraries or define your custom learning goals.
onboarding.no_goals_selected: No goals selected. Choose or type a target above.
onboarding.schedule_subtitle: Align with your life demands. Choose your weekly rhythm, preferred time windows, and target daily study commitment.
onboarding.review_subtitle: Review your parameters. These configure your absolute pacing charts and personalized AI learning coach.

dashboard.priority_queue_empty: You have cleared all prioritized study targets for today. Excellent execution.
dashboard.streak_broken_msg: Streak reset. That's data, not a verdict. Start today's count now.
dashboard.streak_stable_msg: You are holding a stable, consistent line. No flags triggered. Focus on today's session.
dashboard.career_capital_desc: Evaluates skills, certifications, and active transition milestones.

calendar.title: Academic Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Plan, schedule, and track all your academic milestones, exams, and deliverables.
calendar.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
calendar.no_events: No upcoming events. Keep your study horizon clean.

ai_coach.title: Himam AI Career & Syllabus Coach
ai_coach.subtitle: Trained on your active roadmap, curriculum syllabus, and certified target goals to provide absolute focus strategies.
ai_coach.chat_placeholder: Ask anything about your syllabus, exam readiness, or career trajectory...
ai_coach.no_history: Start a conversation to analyze your academic readiness.
ai_coach.memories_subtitle: Core knowledge items retained by the AI Coach to dynamically personalize your academic and career trajectory guidance.

learning.wrong_answer_subtitle: Review, categorize, and master your historic exam and quiz mistakes to build bulletproof exam confidence.
learning.no_active_courses: No active certification courses loaded. Select from the library or define customized learning goals.

career.roadmap_subtitle: Personalized, AI-synthesized career roadmap mapping your current academic state to high-paying professional roles in Saudi Arabia.

internship.tracker_subtitle: Track your applications, interview pipeline, and official offers from leading firms.
internship.no_applications: No internship applications logged yet. Track your professional transition pipeline here.

settings.title: System Control Center
settings.language_subtitle: Switch the system language immediately. Aligns layout directions, typographic pairings, and local date formats.
